metadata.title: Brief an das International Copyright Bureau vom 14. November 1938, SZ-AAP/B3.1

context:
## Dieses Dokument

- Titel: Brief an das International Copyright Bureau vom 14. November 1938, SZ-AAP/B3.1
- Signatur: SZ-AAP/B3.1
- Sprache: Englisch
- Objekttyp: Brief
- Umfang: 3 Scans

pages.transcription:
C O P Y

49, Hallam Street,
London, W.1.

November 14th, 1938.

The International Copyright Bureau Ltd.,
Dewar House, Haymarket,
S.W.1.

Dear Sirs,
With reference to communications addressed to your firm
and Felix Bloch Erben of Berlin, dated 14.Nov., I hereby nominate
your firm to be my sole and exclusive representatives for my works,
on the lines arranged between myself and Messrs. Felix Bloch Erben,
whereby it is understood that commissions payable to your firm shall
be fixed at 10% (ten per cent) if and whenever fresh business is
introduced by myself, and 15% (fifteen per cent) if and whenever
contracts are introduced and completed by your firm.

Will you please confirm this arrangement in writing.
Our exchange of letters will then constitute a contract in the usual
way.

Kindest regards,

Yours,

(signed): STEFAN ZWEIG
pages.notes: Typoskript auf Papier. Oben rechts handschriftliche Ziffer '13' in roter Tinte.

result.confidence_notes: Der Text ist ein klares Typoskript und vollständig lesbar.
